text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Cheval, happy birthday! Diamond and I have 
an original song to present to you♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Your sisters entrusted us with the important 
task of throwing a big celebration for you!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: So, I hope you enjoy. …Cheval is always super serious♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Every day in class, her posture's fabulous♪ Her notes are so neat, the teacher praises her on repeat♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: At cleaning time, she's super serious too♪ She cleans every corner, every spot and speck on the floor, so it looks brand new♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: And when we move classrooms, she's the last one there♪ Making sure nobody's left anything behind! She's delightful, and so very smart, and kind♪

text_block_list.name: Cheval Grand
text_block_list.text:
E-Enough! I can't take any more of this! 
I-I'm going to explode!!
